name: BaseLinePlacing
summary: The BaseLinePlacing class defines a placing where the object is placed using a line as a reference. This will thus define the object's X-axis along that line.

constructors.name: BaseLinePlacing
constructors.summary: Creates a new base line placing instance. The given two points define the line to be used for the placing.

params.name: StartPoint
params.doc: The first point of the line.

params.name: EndPoint
params.doc: The second point of the line.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: EndPoint
properties.summary: Sets the end point of the line that the object is using for the placement.

properties.name: StartPoint
properties.summary: Sets the start point of the line that the object is using for the placement.
